name: manual_d2c04e
claim: Next.js route group folders like (protected) are filesystem-only and never appear in browser URLs. The isSellerRoute middleware matcher must use the actual URL paths (/seller/dashboard, /seller/edit, /seller/upload) — never the folder names.

decisions.notes: proxy.ts had '/(protected)/seller(.*)' which never matched any real URL. /seller/edit and /seller/upload were silently unprotected — currentUser() returned null and triggered redirect('/') instead of loading the page. Pain score: 8.

rationale: proxy.ts had '/(protected)/seller(.*)' which never matched any real URL. /seller/edit and /seller/upload were silently unprotected — currentUser() returned null and triggered redirect('/') instead of loading the page. Pain score: 8.
